metadata.description: Marketplace for the installable frozen-skills package and experimental skill-injector. Installing frozen-skills installs only its manifest-listed active skills; _incubator content is not installed.

plugins.name: frozen-skills
plugins.description: Installs reviewed Doppler, external-intake, OMC maintenance, and official PDM operations skills. Content under _incubator is not included.

plugins.name: skill-injector
plugins.description: WIP, UNTESTED: prompt-submit hook that injects a relevant-skill suggestion + a subagent-prompt quality gate (Ollama default, Gemini fallback). Review/test before installing or enabling.
